categories.name: CONFIGURE_SETTINGS
categories.precondition: Target app is installed and reachable; configuration screen or settings menu accessible
abstract_steps: Launch app from launcher or app drawer
Dismiss any first-run/onboarding screens
Navigate to the settings/preferences area
Navigate to the relevant sub-page if needed
For each requested parameter: locate its section and select the desired option, toggling switches as needed
Grant any system permission triggered
Confirm/apply the changes via the explicit apply/save control
Verify on the resulting screen that selections are reflected
failure_modes: Applying before all parameters are set, exiting the settings page prematurely
Selecting a value that hides dependent options (mutually exclusive choices)
Mis-tapping a dropdown that auto-dismisses without recording a selection
Confusing similar-looking app icons during launch
Assuming feature lives in settings when it lives elsewhere (e.g., contextual menu)
Permission denial leaves the toggle in inconsistent state
verification_checklist: Each requested parameter shows the selected state (checkmark/highlight)
Toggle visibly active (highlighted/colored)
Any summary/status line on main UI reflects the new values
Returning to the settings screen still shows the chosen values
Permission dialog dismissed positively

categories.name: QUERY_INFO
categories.precondition: Information is exposed somewhere in the app's UI (info icons, help dialogs, summary lines, list or detail views)
abstract_steps: Navigate to the screen or entity (list -> item, or search) that contains the desired information
Open details view if metadata required
If hidden, tap the contextual help/info affordance next to the relevant field
Optionally apply a sort/filter to expose the required ordering
Read the dialog, status text, or requested field(s) directly from the UI
Return the exact phrasing/value as the answer
failure_modes: Reading default values instead of values for the requested configuration
Closing the info dialog before extracting the value
Confusing 'recommended' marker with currently selected value
Fabricating data when the target isn't in the library
Reading without ensuring correct sort direction
Confusing counts across different sections (mixing up item-type totals)
Tapping item plays it instead of showing info; must use context menu
Information requires scrolling or expanding
Empty-state messages mistaken for data
verification_checklist: Value is read while the relevant configuration is active
Answer matches text on screen verbatim where requested
Value is visible on-screen at time of answer
Sort/filter state matches the question's requirements
If item cannot be found after a bounded search, declare infeasible
Field label matches request
Value extracted verbatim with units

categories.name: ADD_ENTRY
categories.precondition: App is on its main creation surface or container view that can hold the new entry; storage permission granted; system supports creation flow
abstract_steps: Reach the main creation screen or list screen where new items are created
Locate the primary add/create control (FAB, + icon, overflow menu option, or 'New X' button)
Trigger the primary create/record action to open a creation dialog/form
Provide any required input (name/text, duration, content)
Stop/finish the creation if it is a recording flow
Optionally associate with existing item during creation
If prompted, supply a name and confirm save via the positive dialog button
failure_modes: Save dialog absent because an option to prompt-for-name is disabled
Default name used instead of requested name because dialog dismissed
Creation aborted before save
Clicking the add control on the wrong tab/section
Confirming with empty or invalid name
Dismissing the dialog instead of confirming
Creation entry hidden under overflow menu rather than FAB
Confirmation button hidden by on-screen keyboard
Empty name field prevents creation
verification_checklist: New entry appears in the entry list with the desired name
Entry metadata reflects the configured parameters
Item name matches input exactly
No error toast/dialog remained
Toast or banner confirming creation

categories.name: DELETE_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Entry list is non-empty and visible; target item exists; delete action available in context menu
abstract_steps: Open the list of entries
Select/expand the target entry or open per-item action menu
Tap the delete/remove control
Grant any required system permission
Confirm deletion if prompted
failure_modes: Deleting wrong entry due to mis-tap
Toast confirmation missed; assumes failure
Missing system permission blocks deletion
Stale view continues to show item until refreshed
verification_checklist: Target entry no longer in list after refresh
Confirmation toast/snackbar observed
Permission flow completed

categories.name: NAVIGATE_TO
categories.precondition: Target screen exists and is reachable from current screen via main navigation, tabs, drawer, or quick tiles
abstract_steps: Identify primary navigation affordance (bottom bar, top tabs, drawer, icon, or menu item)
Identify the section name relevant to the task (distinguishing between the different item-type sections available in the app)
Tap the icon/label for target section; if blocked by onboarding, dismiss first
Wait for the list content to load
Confirm arrival via expected visual cue (header text or highlighted nav indicator)
failure_modes: Icon confusable with another app or function
Search/filter expected but not present in current app
Back button leaves the app instead of going up one level
Mistaking text labels for clickable affordances when only icons respond
Adjacent icons on cramped bars cause misclicks
Wrong app opened from launcher due to imprecise icon tap
Acting on the wrong tab's content
Assuming an item exists in a section it doesn't belong to
verification_checklist: Expected title/labels visible on destination
Expected primary action available
Active tab indicator highlights the chosen section
Header/count matches expected section (e.g., 'N <ItemType>')
Expected content type visible (list, grid, etc.)

categories.name: RESET_TO_DEFAULTS
categories.precondition: On settings screen exposing a reset/restore control
abstract_steps: Locate the reset control
Tap reset
Verify defaults are restored
failure_modes: Reset tapped before reading required current values
Reset doesn't affect cross-screen settings
verification_checklist: All visible options show default selections
Summary text matches default configuration

categories.name: SEARCH_FOR_ITEM
categories.precondition: A search affordance is visible on a list screen; filter chips/tabs may be present
abstract_steps: Open the search interface
Type a concise query (a single attribute, not multiple attributes concatenated)
Apply category filter via chip/tab if available
Inspect results, including empty-state; if none, try a broader/alternate term once
If still empty, conclude the item is absent
failure_modes: Appending new text to existing query (producing garbage like 'QueryQuery')
Retrying the same query repeatedly
Treating empty results as transient and looping
Clearing query also resets context unexpectedly
Filter chip not visibly active; misread as off
Pluralization or case-sensitivity not matching expected entries
verification_checklist: Query field shows the intended text only
Active filter chip highlighted
Either a result row appears or an explicit 'No results' message is shown
Result count matches expectation
Bounded retry count respected before declaring infeasible

categories.name: SORT_LIST
categories.precondition: On a list screen that exposes a sort control
abstract_steps: Open the ordering configuration dialog via its icon
Select the desired attribute
Explicitly toggle the ordering direction to the required state
Dismiss dialog and verify order
failure_modes: Selecting only the attribute without setting direction
Using the wrong list's sort dialog (attributes differ across sections)
Declaring success without visually confirming the new order
verification_checklist: Dialog shows target attribute marked
Direction toggle reflects target direction
Top-most items in list match expected ordering

categories.name: OPEN_CONTAINER
abstract_steps: Tap the container row
Verify detail view loads
Check whether the container is empty before further actions
failure_modes: Attempting interaction on an empty container
Treating an empty-container message as a transient error
verification_checklist: Detail view title matches selected container
If empty, an explicit empty-state message is present; declare infeasible for content-dependent goals

categories.name: PLAY_MEDIA
categories.precondition: Target media item is visible in a list or detail view; media library accessible
abstract_steps: Locate the target row via browse or search
Tap to start playback, use the row's play control, or tap a 'Play all' action
Confirm playback UI (now-playing bar / mini-player / full-screen player) appears with the title and playing indicator
failure_modes: Target not in local library (infeasible)
Tapping a container instead of a playable item
Tapping unplayable item shows error toast
Wrong artist/album variant selected due to multiple matches
verification_checklist: Now-playing indicator reflects correct item identity
Mini-player shows expected title
Pause icon visible (i.e., playing state)
Playback controls (pause/seek) are operable

categories.name: ADD_TO_COLLECTION
abstract_steps: Open per-item action menu (three-dot or long-press)
Choose append/insert action (e.g., add to queue, play next, add to playlist)
If choosing playlist, pick existing or create new in dialog
failure_modes: Tapping item directly triggers playback instead of opening menu
Selecting the wrong adjacent item's menu due to imprecise tap
Choosing 'Add to queue' when 'Play next' is required (or vice versa)
verification_checklist: Toast confirming addition
Collection size or contents reflect the addition
Currently playing track not interrupted unexpectedly

categories.name: EDIT_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Target entry has an edit affordance (pencil icon, edit option in menu)
abstract_steps: Open the editor for the entry
Focus target field
Clear existing content if necessary (long-press + Select all)
Enter new value
Dismiss keyboard if it hides save action
Save changes
Grant any file/system permission required
failure_modes: Typing appends to existing text instead of replacing
Save button hidden behind keyboard or below scroll
Permission interrupts save and requires retry
Read-only details dialog mistaken for editor
verification_checklist: Edited field shows new value after returning
Persistent across navigation away and back
No error toast

categories.name: CONFIGURE_PLAYBACK_OPTIONS
abstract_steps: Expand the full-screen player from the mini-player
Toggle the desired option (repeat mode, shuffle, favorite)
Open auxiliary dialogs (sleep timer) and confirm
failure_modes: Repeat icon requires multiple taps to reach 'Repeat One' mode
Confusing 'Add to queue' (append) with 'Play next' (insert)
verification_checklist: Icon state reflects desired mode (filled heart, '1' on repeat, highlighted shuffle)
Timer dialog closed after Start

categories.name: RECOVER_FROM_WRONG_APP
categories.precondition: Wrong app opened from launcher or accidental navigation
abstract_steps: Press Home to return to launcher
Re-open app drawer
Scroll precisely to target alphabetical position
Verify app name label before tapping icon
failure_modes: Repeated mis-taps if icons are clustered or look similar
Long-press gesture instead of swipe opening wallpaper menu
verification_checklist: Splash screen shows correct branding
Expected home screen of the target app appears
